prompt:
Ultra-premium cloisonné enamel collectible fridge magnet displayed inside a bright, high-end store window, vertical 9:16.

Text on the product:
“[CITY NAME] · [COUNTRY]”

Shape:
– custom silhouette based on [MAIN LANDMARK SHAPE]  
– tall vertical composition to emphasize height  
– polished metallic gold frame  

Focal point:
– [MAIN LANDMARK] dominating the composition (70–80% height)  
– highly detailed and visually iconic  

Scene inside the magnet:
– [MAIN RIVER / WATER ELEMENT] flowing at the base  
– [ICONIC BUILDING 1] in the foreground  
– [ICONIC BUILDING 2] or skyline behind  
– [NATURAL ELEMENT e.g. mountain / ocean / desert] in the distance  
– [CULTURAL ELEMENT e.g. temple / monument / bridge]  

Miniature workers (key element):
– tiny craftsmen painting the surface  
– workers on ladders painting details  
– one worker near the top of the main landmark  
– small figures interacting with the environment  

Interaction:
– [FLOATING ELEMENT e.g. petals / leaves / dust / light particles]  
– reflections interacting with surfaces  
– slight imperfections for realism  

Materials:
– cloisonné enamel (glossy translucent colors)  
– embossed metallic outlines  
– handcrafted texture  

Color palette:
– [PRIMARY COLOR]  
– [SECONDARY COLOR]  
– [ACCENT COLOR]  
– subtle metallic highlights  

Environment (important):
– bright modern store interior  
– light wood or marble surfaces  
– glass reflections from display window  
– blurred background with shelves and products  
– optional: people in background slightly out of focus  

Lighting:
– soft natural daylight  
– warm indoor lighting mix  
– realistic reflections and shadows  

Style:
– hyper-realistic product photography  
– miniature world feeling  
– extremely rich in micro-details for zoom  
– premium collectible  

Technical:
– 85mm lens  
– shallow depth of field  
– 8K ultra-detailed  
– highly shareable
